content:
Hello LinkedIn!

🚀 Hiring for Cyber Review Analyst – Cyber Incident Response (CIR) Contractual Roles

📍 Location: Remote
💼 Job Type: Initially a 1-Month Contract (High Chances of Extension Based on Performance)
🧠 Experience: Freshers to 3 Years
📅 Immediate Joiners Preferred
❌ No Interview Process
❌ No Rehire

🔍 Key Responsibilities:
• Review documents as per project protocols
• Identify and extract sensitive information (PII/PHI) from electronic documents
• Perform document analysis and review activities with high accuracy
• Maintain strict confidentiality of client data
• Work efficiently while adhering to project-specific guidelines and quality standards

🎓 Qualifications:
• Any Graduate / Postgraduate
• Freshers with LLB or LLM are encouraged to apply
• Prior experience in Cyber Incident Response (CIR), Document Review, Relativity, or Canopy is an added advantage.
• Strong Excel skills (data extraction, formatting, name/address split, SSN/DOB formatting).
• Typing speed of 50 WPM or higher.
• Strong analytical and attention-to-detail skills.
• Ability to work independently in a remote environment.

⏰ Work Requirements:
• 45 Hours per Week (Weekends May Be Required)
• Shift: 09:30 AM – 06:30 PM
• Power Backup Required

💻 System Requirements:
• Windows 10 or macOS Mojave 10.14+
• 8 GB RAM
• Intel i5 / AMD Ryzen 5 or Later
• Minimum 25 Mbps Internet Connection
• Wi-Fi or Ethernet Connection Preferred
❌ No VPN
❌ No Chromebooks
❌ No Linux
❌ No Mobile Hotspots

📩 Interested candidates can share their CV at:
📧 shravan.k@vipanyglobal.com

🔄 Kindly share within your network and refer eligible candidates.

comment: For document review roles, accuracy is only one part of the equation—consistent handling of sensitive data, escalation judgment, and adapting quickly to project protocols often determine long-term success.
